nasb.text: (for by what he saw and heard that righteous man, while living among them, felt his righteous soul tormented day after day by their lawless deeds),

esv.text: (for as that righteous man lived among them day after day, he was tormenting his righteous soul over their lawless deeds that he saw and heard);

ccb.text: 因为义人罗得住在他们当中，天天耳闻目睹他们一切无法无天的丑行，他正直的心很痛苦。

csbs.text: 因为这义人住在他们中间，看见又听见他们的不法行为，他公义的心天天受到折磨——
